visit_summary: A complete, budget-friendly fine motor toy in great visual condition. Definitely worth a quick $3 pickup!
alignment_summary: The photo shows a complete 12-peg fine motor hedgehog toy, matching the 'Used - Good' condition and simple description.

reasons.text: All 12 colorful pegs are present in the photo, making the set 100% complete.
No cracks, stress marks, or structural damage are visible on the plastic shell or pegs.
Extremely low price ($3) makes this an easy, low-risk purchase.
Highly rated seller (4.5 stars) adds confidence to the transaction.

seller_questions: Hi! Is this still available for pickup?
Are there any deep scratches or chew marks on the pegs that might not show up in the photo?
seller_message_draft: Hi Mah, I'd love to buy this hedgehog toy for $3. When is a good time for me to come pick it up? Thank you!
limitations: The listing description is very brief, offering no details on cleaning or storage.
The toy is shown on a carpeted floor, so a quick sanitizing wipe-down is recommended before play.
research_recommended: Verify if there are any active product safety recalls for 'Learning Resources Spike the Fine Motor Hedgehog'.
Confirm standard cleaning instructions for this plastic toy (e.g., dishwasher safe or hand-wash only).
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
